description_long: This is a detached, two-story house situated on a spacious green lawn, surrounded by open land and neighboring homes. The house features a dark gable roof with dormer windows, white exterior walls, and wooden accents around the entryway and windows. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by columns, providing a welcoming entrance. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, allowing ample natural light inside. The rear of the house has a smaller patio area and additional windows, while the sides are simpler with fewer openings. The overall design is modern with traditional elements, blending comfort and functionality.
description: A two-story detached house with a dark gable roof, white walls, wooden accents, and a covered front porch, set on a large green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, columns, and symmetrical windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain wall with minimal windows and the full height of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a small patio area and additional windows, with the backyard visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a balcony or rear entry and the house's integration with the surrounding lawn.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, central door, and wooden trim
